tool_input.command:
cd /Users/silouane/coorp/serverless-plugins/tests/serverless-plugins-integration
echo "=== FULL error/stack from current branch ==="
npx sls offline start --config serverless.sqs.yml 2>&1 | head -40
tool_input.description: Capture full sls offline crash stack

tool_input.command:
cd /Users/silouane/coorp/serverless-plugins
echo "=== master branch latest CI state ==="
env -u GITHUB_TOKEN gh api repos/CoorpAcademy/serverless-plugins/commits/master/check-runs --jq '.check_runs[] | "\(.name): \(.conclusion)"' 2>&1 | head
echo; echo "=== CI log: context around test-sqs / sqs errors (node20 job) ==="
curl -s -H "Travis-API-Version: 3" "https://api.travis-ci.com/job/639778501/log.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -inE "starting offline sqs|cannot redefine|test:sqs|test-sqs|TypeError|Error:|expected|assert|λ:|exited with" | head -40
tool_input.description: Master CI status + full CI log search

tool_input.command:
cd /Users/silouane/coorp/serverless-plugins/tests/serverless-plugins-integration
echo "=== what holds port 9324? ==="; docker ps --format '{{.Names}}\t{{.Ports}}' | grep 9324 || echo "nothing"
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
nvm use 20.20.2 >/dev/null 2>&1; echo "node now: $(node -v)"
echo "=== run test:sqs under Node 20 (reproduce CI) — capturing sls output ==="
npm run -s test:sqs 2>&1 | head -40; echo "EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}"

cd /Users/silouane/coorp/serverless-plugins
echo "=== latest master commit on origin ==="; git ls-remote origin -h refs/heads/master | head -1
echo "=== Travis: most recent builds (any branch) with sha+state ==="
curl -s -H "Travis-API-Version: 3" "https://api.travis-ci.com/repo/CoorpAcademy%2Fserverless-plugins/builds?limit=6&sort_by=started_at:desc" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for b in d.get('builds',[]):
    print(b.get('number'), '|', b.get('state'), '|', b.get('branch',{}).get('name'), '|', b.get('commit',{}).get('sha','')[:8], '|', (b.get('commit',{}).get('message','') or '').splitlines()[0][:45])
"

cd /Users/silouane/coorp/serverless-plugins
echo "=== node_modules/serverless-offline-sqs (symlink?) ==="; ls -la node_modules/serverless-offline-sqs 2>&1 | head -2
echo "=== temporarily restore MASTER's sqs src, test load on node20 ==="
git checkout master -- packages/serverless-offline-sqs/src/index.js packages/serverless-offline-sqs/src/sqs.js
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"; \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use 20.20.2 >/dev/null 2>&1
cd tests/serverless-plugins-integration
npx sls offline start --config serverless.sqs.yml 2>&1 | grep -iE "redefine|error:|starting offline|getqueueurl|NonExistent|ECONNREFUSED" | head -6
cd /Users/silouane/coorp/serverless-plugins
echo "=== restore my branch version ==="
git checkout HEAD -- packages/serverless-offline-sqs/src/index.js packages/serverless-offline-sqs/src/sqs.js
git status --short packages/serverless-offline-sqs/src
tool_input.description: Test master's sqs code locally for same crash
